data.title: Kōloa Rum Appoints Robert Ramer as COO
data.description: Kōloa Rum Company in Kalaheo, Kaua'i, Hawaii, disclosed on May 1, 2026, the promotion of Robert Ramer as the Chief Operating Officer, filling the position of the former leader Bob Gunter. Known for crafting high-quality Hawaiian rum in small batches, the company is in the midst of a growth phase. This change in leadership marks a significant moment for the company as it continues to expand.
US CENTCOM: 45 commercial vessels have been redirected at Hormuz.

data.title: Stroke Recovery Event: Support, Resources, and Inspiration at Adler Aphasia Center
data.description: A Stroke Recovery Event focused on providing support, resources, and inspiration will be held by the Adler Aphasia Center in Maywood, NJ on May 14th, 2026, from 4:30 pm to 7:00 pm. The event will allow visitors to engage with a variety of over 25 organizations offering relevant programs and assistance.

data.title: Deluxe Recognized With CIO 100 Award for Third Consecutive Year
data.description: In Minneapolis, Foundry’s CIO has recognized Deluxe (NYSE: DLX) as one of the top 100 companies for the third time since 2024. The prestigious CIO 100 list highlights organizations leveraging technology to enhance revenue, efficiency, and customer results. Deluxe, a leading Payments and Data company with nearly 40 years of experience, stood out for its effective transition of operations from an outdated mainframe system. This acknowledgment reflects Deluxe’s commitment to driving tangible business impact through technological innovation.

data.title: Family Counseling Expert Jessica DeFazio of Geneva Expresses How to Support Someone Experiencing Domestic Violence for HelloNation
data.description: Today in Geneva, New York, on May 1, 2026, a recently published article by HelloNation offers advice on how to effectively assist loved ones who may be victims of domestic violence. When concerned individuals suspect a family member or friend is facing abuse, it can be vital to know the most appropriate ways to provide support. Family Counseling Expert provides valuable insights in the HelloNation article on navigating these challenging situations.

data.title: Real Estate Expert Phil Frye of Newark Shares Home Preparation Insights for HelloNation
data.description: In Newark, Ohio, on May 1, 2026, a new article titled "Are You Ready to List? Try This Home Prep Checklist" offers guidance on steps sellers should take before listing a home to appeal to serious buyers and secure strong offers. This HelloNation piece highlights essential tips for preparing a home for sale, aiming to ensure a successful selling process. Readers can access this informative guide to enhance their preparation and attract potential buyers with confidence.

data.title: In HelloNation, Dog Daycare Expert Annette Caporusso Details Dog Daycare Cost in Eau Claire and What Drives Pricing Differences
data.description: In Eau Claire, Wisconsin on May 1, 2026, a recent study on dog daycare pricing sheds light on crucial factors influencing costs for pet owners. This analysis aims to assist in budgeting appropriately and selecting the optimal facility for their pets. The study delves into the average cost of dog daycare services in Eau Claire, revealing a range spanning from $25 to $50 per day. Variances in pricing are driven by factors such as the facility's amenities, staff qualifications, location, and additional services offered. Understanding these determinants can empower pet owners to make informed decisions when choosing a daycare center for their beloved animals.

data.title: In HelloNation, Dog Daycare Expert Annette Caporusso Outlines the Dog Daycare Daily Schedule at Professional Facilities
data.description: Located in Woodbury, Minnesota, a recent piece by HelloNation explores the structured daily routine that shapes the experience of dogs at professional daycare facilities. The article delves into the specifics of a typical day for enrolled dogs, from morning drop-off to afternoon pickup. Presented on May 1, 2026, the piece sheds light on this structured routine which aims to cater to the needs of furry attendees. To learn more about what this entails, including key timestamps and activities, check out the HelloNation article.

data.title: Santa Cruz Software Completes SOC 2 Type II Audit, Strengthening Security Assurance for Enterprise Customers
data.description: Santa Cruz Software is demonstrating its dedication to safeguarding customer data and meeting enterprise procurement standards. The company, based in Santa Cruz, California, confirmed on May 1, 2026, that it has recently passed a SOC 2 Type II audit. This achievement showcases the company's commitment to ensuring the security and privacy of customer information.

data.title: ZETA SURGICAL® Receives FDA 510(k) Clearance Expanding Access to Brain Tumor Biopsies, Hydrocephalus, and Trigeminal Neuralgia
data.description: Today, ZETA SURGICAL revealed that their Zeta Navigation System, in addition to its navigated tools - Zeta Stylet and Zeta Bolt, has obtained 510(k) clearance from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration. This device falls under Class II classification as per the latest announcement.

data.title: I AM ALS Ignites Nationwide Shift in ALS Visibility Launching Landmark Film, Celebrity PSA, and Elevating Thousands of Community Stories for Awareness Month
data.description: Launching today, the 'Every Flag Has a Story' campaign by I AM ALS aims to raise awareness and mobilize community support for those affected by ALS. The initiative focuses on showcasing the personal stories of individuals facing ALS to emphasize the urgency of the situation. This community-driven campaign seeks to highlight the human side of ALS and encourage collective action.

data.title: AmeriGas® Hosts Philly 250 Forum, Bringing Together Philadelphia's Civic and Sports Leaders Ahead of the City's Historic Summer
data.description: A leading retail propane distributor, AmeriGas Propane, L.P., a subsidiary of UGI Corporation (NYSE: UGI), is highlighting Philadelphia's upcoming summer events for its employees. As the title sponsor of the Philadelphia Cycling Classic, the company hosted key leaders at its King of Prussia headquarters to discuss significant events in 2026, including the FIFA World Cup. With its prominent presence in the industry, AmeriGas continues to engage with civic, tourism, and sports sectors to bring excitement to the city.

data.title: Building Better Bones Together: Osteoporosis Awareness and Prevention Month 2026
data.description: During May, the Bone Health and Osteoporosis Foundation (BHOF) in Arlington, VA, is observing Osteoporosis Awareness and Prevention Month, emphasizing the importance of promoting lifelong bone health through unity, daily routines, and collaborative efforts.
